organization.name: Migration Department under the Ministry of the Interior of the Republic of Lithuania
organization.legalName: Migracijos departamentas prie Lietuvos Respublikos vidaus reikalų ministerijos

evidence.label: EU eIDAS Trust List (Qualified Trust Service Provider)

organization.description: Migration Department under the Ministry of the Interior of the Republic of Lithuania is listed as a Qualified Trust Service Provider (QTSP) on the EU eIDAS Trust List for Lithuania, providing digital trust services via nsc.vrm.lt.
